changeSet.author: a.damaneuski
a.damaneuski
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE document ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, unique_number UUID UNIQUE NOT NULL, author_id BIGINT NOT NULL, title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR(255), created_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, updated_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES appUser(id) );

changeSet.author: a.damaneuski
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE history ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, document_unique_number UUID NOT NULL, action VARCHAR(255), initiator_id BIGINT NOT NULL, action_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, comment VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY (document_unique_number) REFERENCES document(unique_number), FOREIGN KEY (initiator_id) REFERENCES appUser(id) );

changeSet.author: a.damaneuski
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE approval_record ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, document_unique_number_ar UUID NOT NULL, author_id_ar BIGINT NOT NULL, approval_date TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (document_unique_number_ar) REFERENCES document(unique_number), FOREIGN KEY (author_id_ar) REFERENCES appUser(id) );

changeSet.author: a.damaneuski
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO appUser (username, email, position) VALUES ('Верховный шаман', 'admin@rutovi4.com', 'admin');
